description: Create a technical fashion flat sketch for a corporate uniform in Wondershare EdrawMax. The design should feature a Navy Blue polo or T-shirt with visible outlines, a Dark Grey or Black pocket on the left chest, and a Yellow rectangle or badge shape representing a logo. Include the title 'SkyHigh Logistics - Uniform Spec v1' at the top of the drawing. Add callouts pointing to specific features with the following text: 'Embroidered Logo' for the badge, 'Contrast Pocket' for the pocket, and 'Double Stitch Hem' for the bottom hem. Save the editable file to /home/ga/Documents/uniform_spec.eddx and export the design as an image to /home/ga/Documents/uniform_spec.png.
